title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 385.212 - Termination, notice required
text:
385.212.  Termination, notice required. — As applicable, an insurer that issued a reimbursement insurance policy shall not terminate the policy until a notice of termination, in a form and time frame prescribed by the director, has been mailed or delivered to the director.  The termination of a reimbursement insurance policy shall not reduce the issuer's responsibility for motor vehicle extended service contracts issued by providers prior to the date of the termination.
(L. 2007 H.B. 221) 
Effective 1-01-08, see § 385.321
